grafiosch.entities.BaseID

Description

grafioschtrader.entities
All entities are located here.
Most entities have a surrogate key of the integer data type.

    Methods in grafiosch.repository with type parameters of type BaseID
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    boolean
    TenantLimitsHelper.canAddWhenCheckedAgainstMayBeExistingTenantLimit(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, T entityClass)
    Checks whether a new entity can be added based on existing tenant limits.
    static <T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    T
    RepositoryHelper.saveOnlyAttributes(org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<T,Integer> jpaRepository, T entity, T existingEntity, Set<Class<? extends Annotation>> updatePropertyLevelClasses)
    Saves an entity with selective attribute updates based on annotation filtering.

    Classes in grafiosch.rest with type parameters of type BaseID
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    Abstract class providing logging and daily limit checks for create, update, and delete (CUD) operations on entities.
    class 
    TenantBaseResource<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
     
    class 
    UpdateCreate<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    Abstract REST controller for creating and updating entities of type T.
    class 
    UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    Abstract REST controller that extends UpdateCreateResource to include functionality for deleting entities with auditing and rights checking.
    class 
    UpdateCreateDeleteAuditResource<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    Delete a shared entity, that means the owner of the entity or an user with the required privileges can delete it.
    class 
    UpdateCreateResource<T extends BaseID<Integer>>
    A REST API that supports the creation and editing of an entity.
